title: Software Update - DFU -  Houston...  Retry button
scenario: DFU failure during firmware update at 10% progress does not navigate user back to retry screen when headset is powered off
steps: 1. Pair the headset with the phone and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Tap 'Update' → 'Continue' → 'Start Update' to begin the firmware update process.
5. During the update (e.g., at ~10% progress), turn off the headset by pressing and holding the Power button to trigger a DFU failure.
6. On the failure screen, tap the 'Retry' button.
expected: User is directed to the previous screen (Software Update screen) where the update process will attempt again.
